info.title: Fortify Software Security Center API
info.description: Legacy specification including only APIs available in 24.4 release. API changes introduced in later releases are not included. See @@springdocpath@@ for an up-to-date specification.

tags.name: issue-attachment-of-issue-controller
tags.description: Manage attachments associated to the issue

tags.name: project-controller
tags.description: Manage container of application versions. (Application versions and their related resources, such as artifacts, can be accessed via a linked resource).

tags.name: bug-filing-requirements-of-project-version-controller
tags.description: Support the iterative sequence to interactively collect the information required to create a new bug in the bug tracking system associated with this project version. Such information includes various parameters required by the bug tracking system, whether the bug tracker plugin needs to perform authentication, and so on.

tags.name: object-storage-migration-controller
tags.description: Migrate files stored in database to object storage

tags.name: project-version-of-auth-entity-controller
tags.description: Manage the association of application versions to the authentication entity (local or LDAP user)

tags.name: artifact-controller
tags.description: Manage application version artifacts

tags.name: issue-of-project-version-controller
tags.description: Manage issues in the application version

tags.name: cloud-job-controller
tags.description: Manage ScanCentral SAST jobs

tags.name: report-definition-controller
tags.description: Manage report definitions

tags.name: ldap-server-controller
tags.description: Manage LDAP servers configuration

tags.name: cloud-worker-of-cloud-pool-controller
tags.description: Manage association of ScanCentral SAST workers with ScanCentral SAST pools

tags.name: alert-history-controller
tags.description: Retrieve the triggered alert events and/or set their status

tags.name: dynamic-scan-request-of-project-version-controller
tags.description: Manage dynamic scan requests associated with the application version

tags.name: project-version-controller
tags.description: Manage application versions. A variety of associated resources are accessible via links.

tags.name: source-file-of-project-version-controller
tags.description: Retrieve the metadata and contents of a source file associated with this application version

tags.name: report-library-controller
tags.description: Manage report libraries

tags.name: user-issue-search-option-of-project-version-controller
tags.description: [Deprecated] Manage issues search options for the application version

tags.name: data-export-controller
tags.description: Manage data exports from SSC

tags.name: job-controller
tags.description: Manage internal SSC jobs

tags.name: plugin-controller
tags.description: Manage OSGI plugins hosted by SSC plugin framework

tags.name: ldap-object-controller
tags.description: Manage LDAP-based authentication entities

tags.name: bug-tracker-of-project-version-controller
tags.description: Manage bug tracker integration for the application version

tags.name: project-version-of-cloud-pool-controller
tags.description: Manage application versions associated with the ScanCentral SAST pool

tags.name: wie-integration-controller
tags.description: WIE integration specific APIs (internal use only)

post.summary: Get status of migration to object storage
Start migration of files to object storage
Stop migration to object storage (can be started again later)
Set status of a dynamic scan request
Check if the current user has a permission for a specific entity
Register new or update current WIE service
Unlink previously linked application version from WIE

get.summary: List all dynamic scan requests (note: uses non-standard advanced search syntax for 'q' parameter

parameters.name: start
parameters.description: A start offset in object listing

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: A maximum number of returned objects in listing, if '-1' or '0' no limit is applied

parameters.name: withoutCount
parameters.description: Disable computing the total object count for the 'count' field

parameters.name: start
parameters.description: A start offset in object listing

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: A maximum number of returned objects in listing, if '-1' or '0' no limit is applied

parameters.name: withoutCount
parameters.description: Disable computing the total object count for the 'count' field

get.summary: Return list of application version issues with recent audits (newer than startDate)

autoApplied.description: Flag equals true if custom tag values was applied automatically

customTagIndex.description: index of assigned tag value within the list of values for that custom tag

Audit value.description: A custom tag value being assigned to issues in the application

id.description: Unique identifier of dynamic scan request

lastUpdateDate.description: The date that the dynamic scan request was updated

objectVersion.description: Dynamic scan request version stored on the server. This value is used for optimistic locking to prevent concurrent modification by different users at the same time.

parameters.description: Parameters that are needed for dynamic scan request

requestedDate.description: The date that the dynamic scan request was submitted

status.description: The status of the dynamic scan request

submitter.description: The id of the user who submitted the dynamic scan request

fileValueDocumentInfoId.description: The file value document info id for an upload file

fileValueName.description: The name of an uploaded file

objectVersion.description: Parameter version stored on the server. This value is used for optimistic locking to prevent concurrent modification by different users at the same time.

valueOptions.description: The name of the uploaded file

values.description: A list of possible values for this parameter

DynamicScanRequestParameter.description: Dynamic Scan Request Parameter DTO object

guid.description: Unique string identifier for this parameter definition

id.description: Unique id for this parameter definition

type.description: Attribute Definition Type from which this parameter definition is based on

guid.description: Unique string identifier for a Dynamic Scan Request Parameter Option

id.description: Unique ID for this parameter option

index.description: Index of this option in list of options

DynamicScanRequestParameterOption.description: Dynamic Scan Request Parameter Option DTO object

status.description: Dynamic scan status to be set

DynamicScanRequestSetStatusRequest.description: Request object for setting a dynamic scan request status

projectVersionId.description: Application version ID to which dynamic scan request corresponds

DynamicScanRequestWithProjectVersionId.description: Dynamic Scan Request object, expanded by application version ID

auditTime.description: Date and time when audit was performed.

conflict.description: Flag that indicates if there were any conflicts when audit information was merged.

seqNumber.description: Sequence number of the history record in the list of all audit history records for the issue.

userName.description: Name of the user who performed the audit.

Issue Attachment.description: attachment (such as screenshot) associated with issue

IssueSearchOption.description: Options that can be used for customizing issue search result.

Object Storage Migration Request.description: Object storage migration request object with no properties.

status.description: Current status of migration to object storage

ObjectStorageMigrationStatus.description: Status of migration of files to object storage.

crossApp.description: True if report applies to multiple application versions

fileName.description: The name of the report definition file

inUse.description: Indicates whether the report definition is in use

objectVersion.description: Report definition version stored on the server. This value is used for optimistic locking to prevent concurrent modification by different users at the same time.

renderingEngine.description: The engine used to render the report, e.g. BIRT

objectVersion.description: Report library version stored on the server. This value is used for optimistic locking to prevent concurrent modification by different users at the same time.

paramOrder.description: Order in which the parameter should appear

defaultValue.description: Indicates whether option is the default value

order.description: Order in which the parameter option should appear

filePath.description: Full path to source file on the machine where scan was performed.

projectVersionId.description: Application version identifier that contains this source file.

SourceFileDto.description: Source file content where vulnerabilities were found.

projectVersionId.description: Application version ID linked to WIE

WIE Application Version Link Request.description: Contains fields needed for linking application version to WIE.

projectVersionId.description: Application version ID linked to WIE

WIE Application Version Unlink Request.description: Contains fields needed for unlinking application version from WIE.

WIE De-registration Request.description: Contains fields needed for WIE de-registration to be performed.

WIE Registration Request.description: Contains fields needed for WIE registration to be performed.

WIE Registration Response DTO.description: Contains a SSC instance GUID for which a WIE registration was made.

WiePermissionCheckRequest.description: Check current user permission request for WIE integration

WiePermissionCheckResponse.description: Check current user permission response for WIE integration

WiePvIssueAudit.description: Issue audit information for WIE integration.
